name: Assess PKS Feasibility
description: Pre-screen a target molecule to determine whether it is amenable to type-I modular PKS biosynthesis. Returns a feasibility score (0-1) and diagnostic checks covering molecular weight, carbon chain length, heteroatom content, aromatic rings, oxygen ratio, functional group complexity, and ring complexity.

inputs.name: smiles
inputs.description: SMILES string of the target molecule to evaluate. Call resolve_smiles first if the user provided a chemical name.

outputs.description: Feasibility assessment containing: feasible (bool), score (float 0-1), molecular_properties (dict with MW, atom counts, stereocenters, rings), checks (array of 7 diagnostic results with name, status, detail, weight), and recommendation (guidance string).

output.recommendation: Strong PKS target — proceed with pks_design_retrotide.

examples.notes: Linear oxygenated chain — classic polyketide backbone

output.recommendation: Poor PKS target — this compound does not match type-I modular PKS characteristics.

examples.notes: Benzene — aromatic, no oxygens, not PKS-accessible

output.recommendation: Strong PKS target — proceed with pks_design_retrotide.

examples.notes: Branched beta-keto acid with hydroxyl — typical PKS intermediate

output.recommendation: Poor PKS target — this compound does not match type-I modular PKS characteristics.

examples.notes: Isobutylamine — too short, nitrogen requires tailoring, no oxygens

trigger_phrases: is this a good PKS target
